destination.name: Consentful Cybernetics

machine_readable_purpose: Help crawlers, LLMs, semantic agents, and careful keepers understand that Consentful Cybernetics is one destination for the LoopNought/Loop-0 project lineage.
human_note: This file is intentionally boring enough for machines and shimmer-readable enough for friends.
